data.general: As the Sun transits in your 2nd house, focus on building a strong financial foundation, and Mercury's presence suggests a busy period with communication and paperwork, but with Jupiter and Venus in your 3rd house, your intellectual pursuits and relationships with siblings or neighbors may bring you joy and success.
data.luck: Mars in your 1st house indicates a period of high energy and courage, but be cautious of impulsive decisions, as the Moon in your 4th house may make you more emotional and sensitive.
data.scope: With Rahu in your 11th house, expansion and growth in your career or higher education may be on the horizon, but Saturn's presence in your 12th house suggests that you may need to work hard to overcome challenges and delays.
data.study: Jupiter and Venus in your 3rd house suggest a period of intellectual growth and exploration, but be cautious of overthinking and taking on too much, as Mercury's presence in your 2nd house may make you more focused on material security.
data.love: Venus in your 3rd house suggests a period of social and intellectual connections, but Mars in your 1st house may make you more competitive and independent in your relationships.
data.travel: With Mars in your 1st house, you may feel restless and want to travel, but the Moon in your 4th house may make you more emotionally attached to your home and family.
